1.1._rationale: Primary Resource: dominated by agricultural land signal and resource suitability (NDVI)

1.2._rationale: Home-Based Production: population density matters most; road access enables market reach

1.3._rationale: Micro Manufacturing: road access critical for supply/distribution; low competition helps

2.1._rationale: Essential Local Services: needs population density and low competition

2.2._rationale: Mobility Services: road accessibility is primary; geographic spread matters

2.3._rationale: Community Services: population density and gap in education/care POIs

2.4._rationale: Professional Services: built-up density, population, low saturation

3.1._rationale: Retail/Distribution: population and competition density; road access for supply chain

3.3._rationale: Tourism: terrain signal, darkness (VIIRS), road access from cities; desert NDVI preferred
